name: Vystar Corporation
summary: Vystar Corporation manufactures and sells Vytex natural rubber latex (NRL) products to the manufacturers of rubber and rubber end products in the United States. Its products are used by manufacturers of a range of consumer and medical products, such as adhesives, gloves, balloons, condoms, and other medical devices, as well as natural rubber latex foam mattresses, toppers, and pillows. The company also offers RXair, an air purifier; and a range of residential furniture and decorative accessories. Vystar Corporation was founded in 2000 and is based in Worcester, Massachusetts.
